message:
Remove remaining dead code: ValueType, Number methods, unused errors, checkBool

Strip 6 more unused items identified by comprehensive audit:
- ValueType enum (only used by removed AnyValue)
- Number.lossyCast and Number.cast (only used by removed Value.as)
- ParseError.IndexOutOfBounds (only used by removed Array.at)
- ParseError.MissingField (only used by removed Object.at)
- checkBool() in atoms.zig (never called)
- assert import (only used by removed Number.cast)
